title: Finalize and prepare Nellore Print Hub for production deployment

requirements.summary: Review all frontend pages and components to ensure production readiness with proper error handling, form validation, and navigation flows
acceptanceCriteria: All customer-facing pages (Home, Services, Gallery, Testimonials, Delivery Info, Quotation Request, Quotation Confirmation) load without errors
All admin pages (Dashboard, Login, User Management, Project Management, Chat Management, Quotation Management, Logo Management) function correctly when authenticated
Form validation works on QuotationRequestPage and SubmitReviewPage
Bottom navigation bar is functional on all customer pages
Chat widget opens and allows message submission
Admin login button is visible at the bottom of the app

file_operations.description: Review and enhance form validation for service type, deadline, project details, mobile number, and email fields. Ensure error states display user-friendly messages and haptic feedback triggers appropriately on validation failures.

Review and enhance form validation for rating, review text, and project type fields. Verify image upload validation (file type and size) displays clear error messages. Ensure haptic feedback works on form submission.

Review navigation functionality across all tabs (Home, Services, Gallery, Reviews, Chat). Verify active state styling works correctly, haptic feedback triggers on tab changes, and safe area padding displays properly on various devices.

Review chat widget functionality including name/email collection on first use, message submission flow, and full-screen modal behavior. Verify error states display appropriate messages if message sending fails.
Review layout component to ensure admin login button is visible at the bottom, company logo loads correctly, and conditional bottom navigation works properly for admin vs customer pages.

Review hero section image loading (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png), feature cards display, swipe navigation functionality, and pull-to-refresh behavior. Ensure all navigation flows work as expected.

Review service category display with icon images (frontend/public/assets/generated/digital-icon.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/flex-icon.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/offset-icon.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/design-icon.dim_256x256.png). Verify pull-to-refresh and swipe navigation work correctly.
Review project gallery filtering by category, pull-to-refresh functionality, swipe navigation, and image loading behavior. Verify skeleton loading states display before data loads.
Review testimonials display with star ratings, rating filter functionality, pull-to-refresh behavior, and skeleton loading states. Ensure all images load correctly.
Review delivery information display and distance-based fee calculator functionality. Verify error states display appropriate messages if calculation fails.
Review confirmation page display with request ID and step-by-step process explanation. Ensure navigation flows work as expected.

Review quotations list display with status badges, project details, and conditional office location rendering for accepted quotations. Verify skeleton loading states and status-based color coding work correctly.
Review admin dashboard statistics display with proper authentication guard. Verify metrics load correctly and display appropriate error messages if backend calls fail.
Review admin authentication page with email/password and biometric login flows. Verify form validation, error message display, and redirect behavior on successful authentication.
Review admin user management page with invitation functionality and admin list display. Verify form validation, error handling, and timestamp formatting work correctly.
Review project CRUD operations including add, edit, and delete functionality with image upload. Verify form validation, upload progress tracking, and error message display.
Review chat management page with customer message grouping, expandable conversation threads, and reply functionality. Verify error handling for message sending failures.
Review quotation management with pricing details, approval flow, negotiation responses, and history display. Verify error states display appropriate messages.
Review logo upload functionality with image preview, file validation, and upload progress tracking. Verify error messages display for invalid file types or sizes.

requirements.summary: Optimize application performance for production with image optimization, React Query caching, lazy loading, and bundle size checks
acceptanceCriteria: Images load efficiently without blocking page render
React Query queries use appropriate staleTime and cacheTime settings
Page transitions are smooth with swipe navigation
Pull-to-refresh functionality works without lag
Skeleton loading states display before data loads

file_operations.description: Review and optimize React Query cache settings for project queries. Ensure appropriate staleTime and cacheTime values are configured for efficient data fetching and caching.
Review and optimize React Query cache settings for review queries. Configure appropriate staleTime and cacheTime values to reduce unnecessary refetches.
Review and optimize React Query cache settings for quotation queries. Ensure appropriate staleTime and cacheTime values are configured for optimal performance.
Review React Query cache settings for quotation statistics with 30-second auto-refresh. Verify staleTime and refetchInterval are appropriately configured.
Review and optimize React Query cache settings for chat message queries. Configure appropriate staleTime and cacheTime values for efficient message fetching.
Review swipe navigation implementation for smooth page transitions. Verify touch event handlers are optimized and scroll prevention works correctly without lag.
Review pull-to-refresh implementation to ensure it works without lag. Verify touch event handlers, pull distance tracking, and threshold triggering are optimized for smooth performance.
Review skeleton loading components for all variants (project, review, service, quotation). Verify shimmer animations perform efficiently and display before actual data loads.
Review ExternalBlob utility class for efficient blob handling. Verify getDirectURL() is used for streaming and caching, and upload progress callbacks work without blocking UI.
Verify hero background image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png) is appropriately sized and loads efficiently. Review image loading strategy to prevent blocking page render.

Verify service icon images (frontend/public/assets/generated/digital-icon.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/flex-icon.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/offset-icon.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/design-icon.dim_256x256.png) are appropriately sized and load efficiently without blocking page render.
Review project image loading strategy using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() for efficient streaming and caching. Verify images load without blocking page render and skeleton states display appropriately.
Review image upload implementation with ExternalBlob.withUploadProgress() to ensure progress tracking doesn't block UI and provides smooth user feedback.

requirements.summary: Ensure mobile app-like experience is consistent across all devices with responsive bottom navigation, haptic feedback, touch targets, and accessible interactions
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom navigation bar is fixed and visible on all customer pages
Haptic feedback triggers on button taps, form submissions, and navigation actions
All buttons and interactive elements meet minimum touch target size
Swipe gestures work smoothly for page navigation
Chat widget opens as full-screen modal from bottom navigation

file_operations.description: Review bottom navigation responsiveness across different screen sizes. Verify fixed positioning works correctly, safe area padding applies on various devices, and navigation is visible on all customer pages.

Review haptic feedback utility functions (tap, success, error, select) for consistency. Verify different vibration patterns trigger appropriately on supported devices and degrade gracefully on unsupported devices.

Review touch-friendly select component to ensure 56px minimum tap target height is maintained. Verify haptic feedback triggers on option selection and component is accessible via touch on all devices.
Verify chat widget opens as full-screen modal from bottom navigation. Review touch interactions for message sending and ensure the widget is accessible via touch on all devices.
Review swipe navigation implementation to ensure gestures work smoothly across different devices and screen sizes. Verify configurable threshold and scroll prevention work correctly.
Review form buttons and input fields to ensure all interactive elements meet minimum 44x44px touch target size. Verify haptic feedback triggers on form submission.
Review form buttons, rating stars, and input fields to ensure all interactive elements meet minimum 44x44px touch target size. Verify haptic feedback triggers on form submission and rating selection.
Review login form buttons to ensure all interactive elements meet minimum touch target size. Verify haptic feedback triggers on button taps for both email/password and biometric authentication.
Review custom CSS for mobile features including safe area utilities, touch target sizing, and animations. Verify mobile-first design principles are applied consistently across the application.

requirements.summary: Configure production environment settings with mainnet canister IDs, Internet Identity production endpoints, and appropriate error logging
acceptanceCriteria: Canister IDs are configured for mainnet deployment
Internet Identity provider uses production settings
All backend actor calls reference correct production canisters
Error messages are user-friendly and do not expose sensitive information
Console logs are minimized or removed for production

file_operations.description: Review Internet Identity authentication configuration to ensure production endpoints are used for mainnet deployment. Verify AuthClient initialization uses appropriate derivationOrigin and identity provider settings for production environment.

Review backend actor initialization to ensure production canister IDs are used. Verify actor creation references correct mainnet endpoints and error handling displays user-friendly messages without exposing sensitive information.
Review error handling and console logs in chat widget. Minimize or remove development console.log statements and ensure error messages are user-friendly for production.
Review error handling and console logs in quotation request form. Ensure error messages are user-friendly and do not expose sensitive information. Minimize development console.log statements.

Review error handling and console logs in review submission form. Ensure error messages are user-friendly and do not expose backend implementation details. Minimize development console.log statements.

Review error handling in admin authentication flows. Ensure error messages do not expose sensitive authentication details like password hashing mechanisms. Minimize development console.log statements.

Review error handling in Internet Identity login flow. Ensure error messages are user-friendly and console.error statements are minimized for production. Verify query cache clearing works correctly on logout.
Review blob storage utility for production-ready error handling. Ensure error messages are user-friendly when blob operations fail and console logs are minimized.
